name: Sean Owen
bio: Sean Owen is a veteran open-source engineer and applied researcher currently working in Mosaic Applied Research at Databricks. He is an Apache Spark PMC member and long-time committer with deep contributions to Spark's MLlib machine-learning library. Before Databricks he was Director of Data Science (EMEA) at Cloudera, where he arrived via the acqui-hire of his startup Myrrix Ltd, which commercialized real-time recommender systems on Hadoop. Earlier in his career he was a senior engineer at Google, where he helped build and launch Mobile Web search and created ZXing ('Zebra Crossing'), the ubiquitous open-source barcode scanning library for Java and Android (33.9k stars). Owen also served as VP and primary committer of Apache Mahout, authoring its Taste recommender framework. He co-authored two O'Reilly books -- 'Advanced Analytics with Spark' and 'Mahout in Action' -- and co-authored the MLlib paper in JMLR. He holds a BA in Computer Science from Harvard University and an MBA from London Business School, where he was selected as a Kauffman Fellow. He received the 2022 ACM SIGMOD Systems Award as part of the Apache Spark community.

timeline.event: Enrolled at Harvard University to study Computer Science (BA)
Joined Google as a software engineer; helped build and launch Mobile Web search
Created ZXing ('Zebra Crossing'), an open-source barcode scanning library for Java and Android that now has 33.9k GitHub stars
Started MBA at London Business School (graduated 2010); selected as a Kauffman Fellow
Became a primary committer and VP of Apache Mahout; authored the Taste recommender framework
Published 'Mahout in Action' (Manning) with Robin Anil, Ted Dunning, and Ellen Friedman
Founded Myrrix Ltd to commercialize real-time recommender systems on Apache Hadoop
Myrrix acqui-hired by Cloudera; became Director of Data Science (EMEA), based in London
Launched Oryx project -- lambda architecture on Apache Spark and Kafka for real-time large-scale machine learning (1.8k stars, now archived)
Published 'Advanced Analytics with Spark' (O'Reilly) with Sandy Ryza, Uri Laserson, and Josh Wills
Co-authored 'MLlib: Machine Learning in Apache Spark' paper (JMLR) with Xiangrui Meng, Matei Zaharia et al.
Joined Databricks as Principal Product Specialist for Data Science and Machine Learning
Published 'Advanced Analytics with PySpark' (O'Reilly, 2nd edition) adding Akash Tandon as co-author
Received the 2022 ACM SIGMOD Systems Award as part of the Apache Spark community
Recent Apache Spark commit: corrected DateTimeFormat.withZone usage in UIUtils (SPARK-46611)
Speaker at Databricks Data + AI Summit 2024
Transitioned to Applied Research at Mosaic (Databricks), focusing on foundation model research

key_contributions.title: ZXing (Zebra Crossing)
key_contributions.description: Open-source multi-format 1D/2D barcode image processing library for Java and Android. Primary author. 33.9k GitHub stars.

key_contributions.title: Apache Spark MLlib
key_contributions.description: Long-time committer and PMC member of Apache Spark with deep contributions to MLlib, Spark's distributed machine learning library.

key_contributions.title: Apache Mahout -- Taste Recommender Framework
key_contributions.description: VP and primary committer of Apache Mahout. Authored the Taste collaborative-filtering recommender framework.

key_contributions.title: Oryx Project
key_contributions.description: Lambda architecture on Apache Spark and Apache Kafka for real-time large-scale machine learning. 1.8k stars (archived).

key_contributions.title: Advanced Analytics with Spark / PySpark (O'Reilly)
key_contributions.description: Co-authored the definitive O'Reilly book on practical large-scale analytics with Spark, covering classification, clustering, collaborative filtering, anomaly detection, genomics, and more.

key_contributions.title: Mahout in Action (Manning)
key_contributions.description: Co-authored with Robin Anil, Ted Dunning, and Ellen Friedman. Practical guide to Apache Mahout's machine learning algorithms.

key_contributions.title: MLlib: Machine Learning in Apache Spark (JMLR Paper)
key_contributions.description: Co-authored the foundational JMLR paper describing MLlib's design, algorithms, and distributed optimization foundations.

key_contributions.title: Myrrix Ltd
key_contributions.description: Founded startup commercializing real-time recommender systems on Hadoop. Acqui-hired by Cloudera in 2013 and evolved into the open-source Oryx project.

quotes.text: Big data was a name for this phenomenon. We suddenly went from a data scarce world to one where you could collect as much data as you cared to.
quotes.source: All Things Data Podcast (University of St. Thomas)

quotes.text: Data is one of the remaining differentiators in this new era of big data and data analytics.
quotes.source: All Things Data Podcast (University of St. Thomas)

quotes.text: Applied research @ Mosaic @ Databricks. Formerly Principal DS/ML Specialist @ Databricks. Apache Spark PMC / committer. Primary author, zxing and Oryx project.
